diagnostic.title: Skills Diagnostic
diagnostic.intro: Answer a few questions to discover offshore wind career pathways that fit your background.

stems.experience: How much experience do you have in the offshore wind or broader energy sector?
stems.background: Which of the following best describes your current background?
stems.interests: Which areas of offshore wind work interest you most?
stems.safetyTraining: Which safety qualifications do you already hold?
stems.technicalSkills: Rate your confidence with technical problem-solving.
stems.digitalSkills: Rate your confidence with digital tools and data analysis.
stems.mobility: Are you able to travel or relocate for work?
stems.education: What is the highest level of education you have completed?
stems.languages: Which languages do you work in professionally?
stems.timeCommitment: How much time per week can you commit to training?

enterprise.title: Build Your OWE Talent Pipeline
enterprise.subtitle: Strategic workforce development solutions for organisations entering or expanding in Ireland's offshore wind energy sector.

workforcePlanning.title: Workforce Planning
workforcePlanning.description: Plan and build your offshore wind team with structured role mapping and recruitment guidance.

skillsGap.title: Skills Gap Analysis
skillsGap.description: Identify critical competency gaps across your workforce and prioritise development areas.

trainingDirectory.title: Training Directory
trainingDirectory.description: Access Ireland's most comprehensive directory of accredited OWE training programmes.

industryIntelligence.title: Industry Intelligence
industryIntelligence.description: Stay informed with the latest research, policy updates, and labour market insights.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to building your offshore wind workforce.

step1.title: Assess
step1.description: Use our diagnostic tool to benchmark your team's current offshore wind competencies against industry standards.

step2.title: Plan
step2.description: Receive a tailored workforce development plan with prioritised skills gaps and recommended training pathways.

step3.title: Develop
step3.description: Enrol your team in accredited courses from leading Irish and international training providers.

teamAssessment.title: Team Skills Assessment
teamAssessment.description: Create a team assessment to benchmark your workforce's offshore wind competencies. Share a link with your team, and receive an anonymised AI-generated training report when enough responses are in.
features: Each team member completes the same 5-minute diagnostic
Results are fully anonymised — you see aggregate data only
AI-generated training recommendations based on team gaps
Matched course suggestions from the SOWA training directory

form.teamNamePlaceholder: e.g. Atlantic Energy — Marine Ops Team
form.responseThresholdHelp: Number of completed assessments before we email your team report.
form.gdprConsent: I consent to SOWA processing this data in accordance with the
form.successDescription: Share the link below with your team members. We've also emailed you a private link to your team report dashboard.
form.reportLinkLabel: Your private report link has been emailed to you.

diagnosticCta.title: Assess Your Team's OWE Readiness
diagnosticCta.description: Use our diagnostic tool to evaluate your team's offshore wind skills and identify training priorities.

trainingCta.title: Enterprise Training Solutions
